name: Benchmarking Multimodal Large Language Models for Scientific Visualization Literacy

description: arXiv:2607.15176v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly used to interpret visualizations, yet current evaluations remain largely chart-centric and provide limited evidence of understanding of scientific visualization (SciVis). We benchmark six MLLMs on the scientific visualization literacy assessment test, a standardized SciVis literacy asse...
author: Patrick Phuoc Do, Chau M. Ta, Chaoli Wang
